title: How one hard habit changes everything
caption:
Discipline isn't built in bursts. It's compounded.

One hard daily habit, done badly at first, tied to something sacred, repeated without waiting to feel ready — that's the mechanism. Not a six-week program. Not a better morning routine. One thing, faithfully, until you don't recognize the man in the mirror.

The man who built one honest habit for six months is unrecognizable to the man who needed to feel ready before he started.

Small is not small if you don't stop.

Save this for the week you want to quit.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #theWork #manofgod #godlymen #christianity #habits
